title: Better Weaponry
description: ⚔️ - 15 new sets of weapons, 7 new enchants, new shields and more !
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41abb78cc2ab46b446a04772eecdd0f6c6ec3c81.png)



Better Weaponry is a mod designed to expand vanilla Minecraft weaponry by adding 15 new weapons sets, 7 new enchantemants, a new shield type and new copper, amethyst and emerald equivalents for each of them. Compatible with Better Combat !

Enchants :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vampirism : Regen a percent of the user's life when he deals damage.

Venomous : Inflict poison to the target.

Stunning : Inflict slowness to the target.

Blinding : Inflict blindness to the target

Damage : Increase the damages that the shurikens deal.

Repel : Increase the knockback that the shurikens deal.

Attract : Make the knockback of the bows negative so the targets get closer from the user.

</details>




_You can put Better Weaponry in your modpack !_
